_comment_top: R6 Wave 7 (Q9 batch migration) — seed row for the TextRefinementHandler 'keypoints' method.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'TextRefinementHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'keypoints' to dispatch to the key-point extraction pipeline.
_comment_method_dispatch: Three rows (TEXT-REFINE / TEXT-KEYPOINTS / TEXT-SUMMARY) share one handler class. Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Extract the most important key points from a text passage as a bullet list. Use when the user wants to identify main takeaways, action items, or critical information from a document section or analysis output.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). Q9 batch migration: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: TextRefinementHandler.ExtractKeyPoints Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the keypoints method. The 'text' field carries the content to analyse; optional 'maxPoints' caps the result count.

text.description: The text passage to extract key points from. The handler does NOT pre-process this — it is the literal input to the LLM.

maxPoints.description: Maximum number of key points to extract. Defaults to 5 if omitted; clamped to [1, 20].

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'keypoints' is the dispatch discriminator. Default maxPoints = 5; per-invocation tool args may override.
